title: Desi Romeos
overview: Desi Romeos is the story of six boys who are popular in college for their music. It describes  their journey from the days of the hostel to house no. 55, where they stay on rent and where romance blossoms between them and the girls (JULIET) staying as PG (Paying Guest)in the house opposite them to the jail. Desi Romeos’ is a fun filled story of a normal group of boys with lots of action, romance and music, keeping you entertained throughout
